title: Exact Finite Specialization Order Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite specialization preorder T0 antisymmetry QF_UF/Alethe regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Indiscrete two-point topology where mutual specialization forces equality under a false T0/antisymmetry claim while the source row keeps the points distinct.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional specialization-order rows only when they add distinct topology/order, quotient, or proof-reconstruction pressure; keep sobriety, T0 quotients, domain theory, and arbitrary-space theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite topological spaces as deterministic finite set-family obligations.
Replay the specialization preorder from open-set membership, not from a trusted listed relation.
Replay singleton closures and the equivalence x <= y iff x is in closure({y}).
Route the bad T0/antisymmetry row through checked QF_UF/Alethe evidence after finite replay identifies mutual specialization.
Keep sobriety, T0 quotients, domain-theoretic order, and arbitrary topological-space theorems under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
